claim_boundary: Configured metadata and guardrails only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
configuration_scope: Source registry, schedule, provenance fields, uncertainty labels, and health-specific guardrails configured.
guardrails: Separate confirmed from suspected cases.
Flag reporting lag.
Do not produce personal medical advice.
name: WHO Disease Outbreak News

claim_boundary: Configured metadata and guardrails only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
configuration_scope: Source registry, API/RSS schedule, contributor provenance, and humanitarian-report guardrails configured.
guardrails: Track original contributing organization.
Flag NGO/field reports as possibly revised.
Do not treat early impact counts as final.
name: ReliefWeb / OCHA

claim_boundary: Configured metadata and guardrails only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
configuration_scope: Source registry, hazard-class fields, alert-level mapping, and multi-hazard guardrails configured.
guardrails: Use GDACS alert levels as source claims.
Do not overstate automated impact models.
Link back to originating agency where available.
name: GDACS

claim_boundary: Configured metadata and guardrails only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
configuration_scope: Indicator metadata, country fields, reporting-period fields, and cross-country comparison guardrails configured.
guardrails: Treat values as statistical context, not real-time events.
Track national reporting quality where documented.
No investment advice.
name: World Bank Open Data

claim_boundary: Configured metadata and guardrails only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
configuration_scope: Macro indicator metadata, revision-awareness fields, and financial-use boundary configured.
guardrails: No trading or investment recommendations.
Track revisions.
Distinguish estimates from final reported statistics.
name: IMF Data

claim_boundary: Configured metadata and guardrails only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
configuration_scope: EU dataset registry fields, multilingual source fields, and policy/dataset separation configured.
guardrails: Separate dataset release from policy interpretation.
Preserve original language.
Flag translation limitations.
name: EU Open Data Portal

claim_boundary: Configured metadata and guardrails only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
configuration_scope: Regional health-surveillance metadata, reporting-period fields, and EU health guardrails configured.
guardrails: Regional scope only.
Flag member-state reporting variation.
Separate raw case counts from modeled transmission.
name: ECDC
